name: qv8 raw top8
cause: new qv8 wording exposed tail latency and one missed abstention label
insight: new wording found evaluator granularity and latency issues, not retrieval collapse
next_basis: keep raw and recomputed rows separate

name: qv8 recompute
cause: saved qv8_a12 answer was a real refusal but detector missed it
result: abstention corrected to 1.0 on same answers
insight: score rose by measurement repair, not model behavior
next_basis: do not call this a speed or answer-generation improvement

name: qv8 top5 award guard
cause: top5 made qv8_a11 faster but answer shape drifted before guard
result: award-result guard restored refusal and improved qv8 top5
insight: pre-generation refusal can improve speed when requested final result is unsupported

name: qv8 a12 victim preempt
cause: qv8_a12 was still slow because refusal was generated before trimming
insight: single abstention EDD is not comparable; latency signal is the point
next_basis: confirm no false positive on full qv8

name: qv8 full award+victim guards
cause: a11 and a12 were both guardable unsupported/sensitive requests
result: full qv8 top5 reached EDD 99.13 and latency 11.813s
insight: real qv8 diagnostic improvement, but still exposed
next_basis: next test must be non-qv8 generalization and field-level scoring
